tagline: Unify your workplace technology for greater savings and stronger teams.
description: One platform that brings together your workplace and employee needs; to deliver savings, improve experience and boost team connectivity. Workplace solutions

features.name: Optimize
features.description: Rebalance and fully utilize your workplace with real-time and granular data insights to increase available capacity and reduce cost.

features.name: Experience
features.description: Create a seamless and frictionless environment with intuitive technology solutions designed around workplace and employee needs.

features.name: Manage
features.description: Use AI driven planning tools for space allocation, growth modelling and scenario analysis while incorporating policies and team preferences.

testimonials.name: Global Insurance Leading Firm

testimonials.name: Corporate Real Estate Leaders
testimonials.description: Benchmark their performance, make informed space decisions, and plan workplace strategies based on data

trial_info.name: Free Workplace Occupancy Trial
trial_info.description: Discover how your office really works. Gain actionable insights with real-time data and analytics tools that help you optimize space performance and shape future real estate planning.

steps.name: Sign-up
steps.description: Complete the quick form to register and kick off your 3-month trial.

steps.name: Install
steps.description: Our team handles on-site setup – all equipment included, ready to go, no IT hurdles.

steps.name: Measure
steps.description: Collect real-time occupancy and workplace data to see exactly how your spaces are used.

steps.name: Review
steps.description: Get a detailed insights report and executive summary, highlighting opportunities, efficiency gains, and potential ROI.
